WALL: Dominant Monthly Call OI (38k) defines the upper boundary of the price channel for the medium term.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed short-term (positive 0DTE/Weekly GEX 22.43B), but negative Monthly GEX (-9.43B) signals volatility expansion risk on structural breaks
outlook.summary: Consolidation between Max Pain magnet (6550) and Call Wall resistance (6700). Extreme Vol/OI ratios at spot (6600) indicate panic hedging. Bearish skew (1.51) and elevated PCR (1.48-3.21) confirm fear positioning. Positive short-term GEX stabilizes price action. Break above 6700 targets 6800 confluence; break below 6550 accelerates toward 6400 resonance support.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Highest PUT OI across ALL three expiries (0DTE: 7271, Weekly: 8546, Monthly: 24251). Major structural support with extreme bearish positioning. Skew ratio 1.51 confirms put premium.
0DTE dominant CALL OI (8990) capping upside. Significant CALL interest in Weekly (6189) and Monthly (4049) confirms structural resistance. Primary target for bearish rejection.
Weekly Gamma Flip near spot (0.96% above). Critical pivot where dealer gamma exposure changes sign. Break above triggers positive feedback loop toward 6800.
0DTE Max Pain (1.3% below spot) with Weekly Max Pain (6575) nearby creating dual magnet zone. Dealer target for minimal option payout. Strong gravitational pull.
CONFLUENCE: Weekly CALL WALL (7095 OI) + Monthly significant CALL OI (4654). Secondary resistance zone. Target if 6700 breaks convincingly.
Extreme Vol/OI ratios (6600 CALL: 5.15x, 6605 CALL: 9.17x, 6600 PUT: 8.26x) indicate panic hedging and aggressive gamma scalping. Active price discovery zone near spot.
0DTE Gamma Flip below spot. If price breaks 6550 magnet, this level becomes critical support. Marks transition to dealer short-gamma acceleration zone.
